user.title: GBS Control
user.description: Enter the hostname or IP of your GBS Control device.

zeroconf_confirm.title: GBS Control
zeroconf_confirm.description: Do you want to add the GBS Control device at {name}?

reconfigure.title: GBS Control
reconfigure.description: Update the hostname or IP of your GBS Control device.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the device.

abort.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the device.

send_command.name: Send command
send_command.description: Send a raw single-character command to a GBS Control device.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The GBS Control device to send the command to.

command.name: Command
command.description: Single command character, e.g. 7 (scanlines) or f (peaking).

path.name: Endpoint
path.description: uc = user/web command, sc = low-level serial command.

set_slot.name: Set active slot
set_slot.description: Switch the device to a saved slot.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The GBS Control device to send the command to.

slot.name: Slot
slot.description: Slot identifier (single character) as used by the device, e.g. 0.

save_slot.name: Save slot
save_slot.description: Save the current settings to a slot with a name.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The GBS Control device to send the command to.

name.name: Name
name.description: Name to store for the slot.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The GBS Control device to send the command to.
